title: Let's create your organization, {userName}
subtitle: Your first workspace activates the main tenant for the admin panel and unlocks the private product modules.

benefits.ownerDescription: Your first organization is linked to your account with full access to configure the workspace.
benefits.tenantDescription: As soon as the organization is created, we set the active tenant and send you straight to the dashboard.

form.title: Create your main organization
form.subtitle: You will be able to add more organizations and invite other people in the next product steps.
form.slugPreviewEmpty: Type the name to generate the slug automatically.
